name: memory-store
description: Memory Store skill pack for agent-native company-memory workflows. Includes Memory Store Basics, LinkedIn Studio, and Marketplace Operator.

interface.longDescription: Use Memory Store MCP as the context layer for agent-native workflows built by Memory Store. Includes Memory Store Basics for the checkin, recall, sparse briefs, record, and report-issue loop; LinkedIn Studio for turning company memory into public posts; and Marketplace Operator for maintaining the Memory Store plugin marketplace, scouting new Memory Store-backed plugin opportunities, and auditing whether skills or plugins need upgrades.
defaultPrompt: Orient me with Memory Store basics: check in, select relevant briefs, recall evidence, and tell me what should be recorded.
Act as our LinkedIn Studio. Find memory-backed post ideas and draft them in our voice.
Audit the Memory Store plugin marketplace and tell me what needs updating.
